name: plan-forge
description: Forge vague ideas into bite-sized, executable action plans
triggers: 任务复杂度超过单次实现
需要将大目标拆解为可执行步骤
用户说'这个任务太大了'

commands.create_plan: Read .plan/plan.md if exists, otherwise create new plan
commands.validate_plan: Check plan against quality criteria (≤7 tasks, atomic, specific, testable)
commands.next_task: Read .plan/plan.md, identify first unchecked task, output its details
commands.split_plan: When plan exceeds 7 tasks, split into .plan/subplans/ with master plan

references.description: What makes a plan good: atomicity, specificity, testability, independence, boundedness
Common planning anti-patterns and how to avoid them
